name: ooda-loop
description: Evaluations for ooda-loop skill trigger accuracy

evals.name: trigger-positive-explicit
evals.description: Skill should trigger when user explicitly mentions OODA, rapid decision, time pressure, or competitive response

prompts.input: 用 OODA 循环分析这个竞争对手的动作
prompts.reason: Exact Chinese trigger 'OODA' in rapid decision context

prompts.input: We're in a time pressure situation and need to respond to competitor's move fast
快速决策框架：observe, orient, decide, act — 我们该怎么做？
prompts.reason: Chinese trigger '快速决策' + OODA cycle mention

prompts.input: Incident response: we need rapid decision-making. Help me use OODA loop
紧急决策：竞争环境下需要快速迭代，用快速决策循环怎么做？
prompts.reason: Multiple triggers: '紧急决策' (time pressure) + '竞争' (competitive) + '快速迭代' (fast iteration)

evals.name: trigger-negative-general
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger for slow-analysis, reversibility, or non-competitive scenarios

prompts.input: Help me carefully plan our product roadmap for the next 12 months
prompts.reason: Long-term planning, not time-pressured; should use second-order-thinking or planning frameworks

prompts.input: 分析一下这个系统架构的反馈回路和杠杆点
prompts.reason: Systems thinking about structure; should trigger systems-thinking skill

prompts.input: Before launch, let's do a thorough risk assessment of all possible failures
prompts.reason: Pre-launch analysis without time pressure; should use pre-mortem or margin-of-safety
